zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Coker於1455年出生在英國多瑟特馬普德時，他的父親John Coker31歲，母親Avice Mallett31歲。他於1472年與Jane Sutton在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1529年在英國多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Coker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from a group of villages in Somerset named with Coker, from a Celtic river name meaning ‘crooked’.

variants.name: Cocker
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Middle English coker ‘fighter, wrangler’.
English: occupational name, ‘one who puts up hay in cocks’, a seasonal occupation.
Probably an Americanized form of German   Kocher  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Coker was born in 1455, in Mappowder, Dorset, England, his father, John Coker, was 31 and his mother, Avice Mallett, was 31. He married Jane Sutton in 1472, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1529, in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Coker est né en 1455, à Mappowder, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Coker, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Avice Mallett, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Jane Sutton en 1472, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1529, à Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Cokerが1455年にイギリスドールセトマップオウダーで生まれた時，父John Cokerは31歳，母Avice Mallettは31歳であった。1472年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでJane Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1529年にイギリスドールセトメルコンベ レジスで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Coker(이)가 1455년 영국 도르세트 마포우더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Coker(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice Mallett(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1472년 영국 링코실르에서 Jane Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1529년 영국 도르세트 멜코브 레지스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ro.West Coker, South Somerset, Somerset, En: West Coker, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Coker родился в 1455 г. в местности маппоудир, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Coker было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Avice Mallett, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Sutton в 1472 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1529 г. в местности мелкомб регис, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.
